---
name: Content suggestion
about: Suggest a new Application Note, project, or content change
title: "[CONTENT] "
labels: content
---

**What content is this about?**
e.g. a new Application Note, an update to an existing one, a new certification.

**Details**
Describe the content and where it should live (e.g. `projects/an-006-*.html`).

**Supporting materials**
Link or attach any source material (reports, diagrams, PDFs).
